particulars.description: All monies. Equitable mortgage premises held under least dated 6/1/1893 made between the right honourable hugh earl annesley to robert james porter and therein describes as "firstly all that and those the tenement dwelling house and premsies fronting main st in the town of castlewellan measuring in breadt in front to said street 32FT and extend- ing in depth from front to rear 144FT 7" be said measurements or either of them more or less bounded on the south east by the said main st on the north west by the back lane, on the north east by w mccartans tenement and on the south west by john flynns tenement and secondl all that and those the garden situate at the rere of the firstly described pre- mises measuring in breadth 42FT and extending in depth from front to rere on the south west side 215FT 6" and on the north east side 217FT be said measure- ments or any of them more or less bounded on the north west by the demesne wall on the south east by the back lane separating the garden from the firstly described premises on the south west by john o'flynns garden on the north east by w mccartans garden which said pre- mises are now known as 57 main st castlewellan co down.
